headings.text: Location: Trade Fair Center Messe München, Germany
Also, we've prepared some free tickets, click the link and apply for them!
We’ve got everything ready, just wait for your arrival. ;)

sections.heading: Meet PCBWay at electronica 2024!
sections.text: Blog > Meet PCBWay at electronica 2024! Meet PCBWay at electronica 2024! by: PCBWay Oct 18,2024 12802 Views 7 Comments Posted in News Once again, we welcome the famous technology event electronica in Munich, Germany! Since the first exhibition was held in 1964, electronica has gradually grown and now covers the entire world of electronics, including the micro- and nano-worlds of semiconductor and micro systems technology, as well as measurement and sensor technology, display technology and vehicle electronics, etc., which is the best choice for any technology enthusiasts and industry practitioners. PCBWay has participated in theelectronica many times and has received a warm response every t...
